narrative:
71 Ohio House district has 75,270 registered voters, with 52.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.2 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -10.3% D−R vs -29.3% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
